description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof, surrounded by a perimeter wall and situated adjacent to a paved road. The structure is composed of multiple interconnected rectangular volumes, creating a layered and dynamic facade. The exterior is predominantly finished in a light, neutral color, with minimal ornamentation and large, horizontal windows on one side. The property includes a small landscaped area with greenery and a palm tree, as well as a paved driveway leading to a covered parking space. The rear of the house opens to a private courtyard or patio area, partially enclosed for privacy. The overall layout emphasizes privacy, functionality, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with clean lines, perimeter walls, and a mix of open courtyards and landscaped areas, featuring large horizontal windows and a covered driveway.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, perimeter wall, and driveway connecting to the street.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the sloped lot, landscaped area, and the covered parking space.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the private courtyard or patio and the layered structure of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the long row of horizontal windows and the driveway entrance from the street.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with long horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flush door, no porch, and direct access from the driveway through a perimeter wall gate
